raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I am writing to file a formal complaint regarding an unauthorized charge of {$130.00} that was posted to my XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX American Express XXXX ( ending in XXXX ). This charge originated from a car rental reservation made through a company called XXXX, and despite my repeated attempts to resolve the matter with both the merchant and my card issuer, the issue remains unresolved. 

To clarify the situation : I did not authorize this transaction. The reservation was mistakenly made by my XXXX niece, who was attempting to get an online quote and inadvertently completed a booking using my card information. As soon as I received the confirmation email, I contacted XXXX  to inform them that this charge was unauthorized and that I had no intention of using their service. 

Initially, XXXX advised me to submit an email explaining the situation and assured me that a refund would be issued. I complied with this request and followed up multiple times, but no refund was ever processed. Eventually, they offered a partial refund in the form of a wallet creditminus an administrative feewhich I declined, as I had never authorized the transaction in the first place. Following this, XXXX blocked my email address, cutting off any further communication. 

I then filed a dispute with American Express, clearly stating that : I did not authorize the charge. 
I did not use or benefit from the services. 
I notified both the merchant and American Express immediately upon discovering the charge. 
Despite this, American Express has repeatedly denied my dispute and reinstated the charge. I have met all procedural obligations for reporting fraud and have provided documentation each time. Nonetheless, the response from American Express has been inadequate and, at times, dismissive. I have encountered unprofessional conduct from multiple customer service and fraud department representatives, including being interrupted, spoken over, and not taken seriously. 

To be clear, I did rent a vehicle through XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX this period, and that charge was processed through a separate American Express card that I own. The XXXX transaction is unrelated and unauthorized. 

I am requesting the following from your office : Support in obtaining a full and final reversal of the {$130.00} charge. 
Consideration of the handling of my case by American Express, particularly the conduct of their fraud and customer service departments. 
All relevant documentation, including communications with XXXX, dispute submissions to American Express, and transaction details, can be provided upon request
